given: the full set of existing stock rows before the split migration
then: every original row still exists afterward with its canonical location and quantity unchanged, so no stock position is lost or corrupted

independence.rationale: AC1 and AC2 assert what the new batch/serial columns hold; this AC adds the distinct preservation outcome that the pre-existing rows and their canonical fields are untouched, which can be broken (a dropped or altered row) while the parsing outcomes still hold on surviving rows.
